title: Regular OR coefficient parameters
summary: Introduces the half-dimension shift and the three rational Pochhammer parameters used in the regular Ovsienko–Redou coefficient formula, with one algebraic rewrite.

mathematicalContent.heading: Half-dimension shift
mathematicalContent.body: For total degree N and rational dimension parameter n, the common shift is (n−2N)/2.

mathematicalContent.heading: Three Pochhammer parameters
mathematicalContent.body: The regular formula uses α for the combined input powers and β,γ for the two separate input factors.

mathematicalContent.heading: Verified rewrite
mathematicalContent.body: Lean proves the displayed form of α+b+c used when matching the local recurrence multiplier.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Defines the shifted half-dimension parameter associated with order N.

correspondence.leanType: def ORAlpha (N : ℕ) (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) : ℚ
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Defines the Pochhammer parameter depending jointly on the two input weights.

correspondence.leanType: def ORBeta (N : ℕ) (n w₁ : ℚ) : ℚ
def ORGamma (N : ℕ) (n w₂ : ℚ) : ℚ
theorem ORAlpha_add_b_add_c {N : ℕ} (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) : ORAlpha N n w₁ w₂ + (I.b + I.c : ℕ) = -(2 * w₁ + 2 * w₂ + n - 2 * (N : ℚ) - 2 * I.b - 2 * I.c) / 2
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Rewrites α+b+c as half the negative first/second-slot recurrence multiplier.

references.locator: Classification of invariant bilinear differential operators
references.note: Flat-model origin of the coefficient family.
Primary curved ambient source for the encoded OR recurrence.

limitations: The parameters and algebraic identity are proved over ℚ. This module neither defines the complete OR coefficient nor establishes recurrence or tangentiality.
